annual_marginal_vector.linearization: stationary selected annual means equal the uniform pool means; raw targets are uniform mean products plus detrended Daymet variance/covariance
annual_marginal_vector.noninferiority: each normalized centered component <= its uniform-library component + 1e-7 + 2e-12 replay guard
annual_marginal_vector.strict_improvement: aggregate normalized centered L1 distance <= 0.95 times uniform-library distance

authority_map.annual_marginal_improvement: detrended centered variance/covariance from exposed Daymet 1980-2009 fit-period annual series
authority_map.fitted_monthly_surface: accepted A5a station .par bytes represented by A5b base_station parameters
authority_map.path_dependence_improvement: identically detrended exposed Daymet, chronological baseline, and candidate annual series
authority_map.unparameterized_preservation: uniform faithful_5_32_3 plus qc_filter off development library

calendar.path_policy: Gregorian source and destination years have identical 365/366-day class
calendar.relabeling: day and month remain unchanged; destination year is relabeled in a separately rendered daily segment

monthly: precipitation and temperature first/second raw sums
daily precipitation-temperature and Tmax-Tmin raw cross sums
wet-day duration, time-to-peak, and peak-ratio first/second raw sums

finite_prefix.marginal_rule: replay fitted-monthly, unparameterized, annual-mean, and centered annual improvement constraints on empirical block frequencies at each horizon

library_realizations.role: one canonical nested library, not an independent replicate

marginal_solver.certificate: primal weights plus independently recomputed centered targets, constraints, and objective
marginal_solver.deterministic_tie_break: second solve within 1e-9 of optimum minimizing index-weighted weights
marginal_solver.stationary_mean_rule: precipitation, Tmax, and Tmin annual means equal their uniform-pool means
marginal_solver.objective: normalized L1 distance to six centered detrended-Daymet variance/covariance targets

path.noninferiority: each identically detrended dependence component <= chronological component + 0.10 normalized units
path.strict_improvement: aggregate detrended dependence distance <= 0.95 times chronological baseline distance
path.thirty_year_rule: strict separately rendered first 30 years of the constructed 100-year path

selection_rule: Choose the first pool in ascending order, then the first algorithm in declared order, only if all 17 stations and all three seeds pass stationary marginal, finite-prefix marginal at both horizons, detrended dependence, boundary-vector, calendar, reuse, render, and physical identity rules; otherwise issue the most specific hold.
